steps.title: Hardware Identification
steps.content: Verify package contents including the cage body, padlock with keys, and mounting bolts.

es.title: Identificación de Herrajes
es.content: Verify package contents including the cage body, padlock with keys, and mounting bolts.

steps.title: Mounting Location Setup
steps.content: Select top rail position on open trailers or wall frame post on enclosed trailers.

es.title: Mounting Location Setup
es.content: Select top rail position on open trailers or wall frame post on enclosed trailers.

steps.title: Drill and Bolt
steps.content: Secure the cage to rail using the carriage bolts. If mounting in enclosed trailer, secure into wall framing with self-tapping screws.

es.title: Drill and Bolt
es.content: Secure the cage to rail using the carriage bolts. If mounting in enclosed trailer, secure into wall framing with self-tapping screws.

steps.title: Base Pad & Adjustments
steps.content: Install base rubber padding to cushion the can. Tighten all hardware snug to protect against travel vibration.

es.title: Base Pad & Adjustments
es.content: Install base rubber padding to cushion the can. Tighten all hardware snug to protect against travel vibration.
